ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code representing the country */,
  "country_iso" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_desc" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "classification_code" TEXT /* Code for the commodity classification */,
  "classification_desc" TEXT /* Description of the commodity classification */,
  "classification_level" INTEGER /* Level of the classification */,
  "parent_classification_code" TEXT /* Code of the parent classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flows" (
  "flow_code" TEXT /* Code representing the flow of trade */,
  "flow_desc" TEXT /* Description of the flow of trade */,
  "flow_type" TEXT /* Type of trade flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the reporter country */,
  "reporter_iso" TEXT /* ISO code of the reporter country */,
  "reporter_desc" TEXT /* Description of the reporter country */,
  "reporting_level" TEXT /* Level of reporting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_data" (
  "customs_code" TEXT /* Code representing the customs classification */,
  "customs_desc" TEXT /* Description of the customs classification */,
  "customs_code_type" TEXT /* Type of customs code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customs_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_modes" (
  "mot_code" TEXT /* Code representing the mode of transport */,
  "mot_desc" TEXT /* Description of the mode of transport */,
  "mot_type" TEXT /* Type of mode of transport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mot_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "qty_unit_code" TEXT /* Code representing the quantity unit */,
  "qty_unit_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the quantity unit */,
  "qty_unit_desc" TEXT /* Description of the quantity unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qty_unit_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregation_levels" (
  "aggr_level_code" TEXT /* Code representing the aggregation level */,
  "aggr_level_desc" TEXT /* Description of the aggregation level */,
  "aggr_level_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggr_level_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "ref_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reference period */,
  "ref_year" INTEGER /* Year of the reporting period */,
  "ref_month" INTEGER /* Month of the reporting period */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reporting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_desc" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the validation record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trade data record */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of validation */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message describing the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has read access */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has write access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trade data record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "changed_column" TEXT /* Name of the column changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
